questions.question: 4 friends share a pizza that costs £12. How much does each person pay?
You buy 3 bags of apples for £6. How much is 1 bag?
A taxi costs £20. 5 people share the cost equally. How much does each person pay?
You earn £80 in 4 days. How much do you earn per day?
Which word means to split equally between people?
